subcodes.first_line: Whatsoever thou beholdest this day in the theatre of contingent existence shall ere long become manifest and evident - these vain imaginings and idle fancies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه اليوم در تماشاگاه امکان مشاهده نمائی عنقريب مشهود و واضح گردد که اوهام باطله و خيالات
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the power of words; of speech, @love of God
